Scripts.OnClick: Dcr_Saved.LeaderMode = this:GetChecked(); -- Dcr_UpdateAll(); -- 这个函数不存在，移除调用以避免错误

Scripts.OnShow: this.UpdateYourself = true;
this:SetChecked(Dcr_Saved.EnablePrivateWarning or false);
this:SetChecked(Dcr_Saved.EnablePublicMessage or false);
this.UpdateYourself = true;
this.UpdateYourself = true;
this.UpdateYourself = true;
UIDropDownMenu_SetSelectedID(this, 1);
DecursiveLeaderModeFrame:Show();
Dcr_AmountOfAfflictedSlider_OnShow();
Dcr_CureBlacklistSlider_OnShow();
Dcr_ScanTimeSlider_OnShow();
this:SetChecked(Dcr_Saved.EnablePrivateWarning or false);
this:SetChecked(Dcr_Saved.EnablePublicMessage or false);
this:SetChecked(Dcr_Saved.LeaderMonitorMagic or false);
this:SetChecked(Dcr_Saved.LeaderMonitorDisease or false);
this:SetChecked(Dcr_Saved.LeaderMonitorPoison or false);
this:SetChecked(Dcr_Saved.LeaderMonitorCurse or false);
